'''zajacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoatrophy|pseudoatrophy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoatrophy|pseudoatrophy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zajacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjæchæth|zæjæchæth]] || [[word:zæjæchæj|zæjæchæj]] || [[word:zæjæchæsh|zæjæchæsh]] || [[word:zæjæchæ|zæjæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajajachath|zajajachath]] || [[word:zajajachaj|zajajachaj]] || [[word:zajajachash|zajajachash]] || [[word:zajajacha|zajajacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajachath|zajachath]] || [[word:zajachaj|zajachaj]] || [[word:zajachash|zajachash]] || [[word:zajacha|zajacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajafchath|zajafchath]] || [[word:zajafchaj|zajafchaj]] || [[word:zajafchash|zajafchash]] || [[word:zajafchaf|zajafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajachatha|zajachatha]] || [[word:zajachaja|zajachaja]] || [[word:zajachasha|zajachasha]] || [[word:zajachaka|zajachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajachath|zajachath]] || [[word:zajachaj|zajachaj]] || [[word:zajachash|zajachash]] || [[word:zajacha|zajacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajachathal|zajachathal]] || [[word:zajachajal|zajachajal]] || [[word:zajachashal|zajachashal]] || [[word:zajachakal|zajachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajachathatha|zajachathatha]] || [[word:zajachajaja|zajachajaja]] || [[word:zajachashasha|zajachashasha]] || [[word:zajachaka|zajachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajachathan|zajachathan]] || [[word:zajachajan|zajachajan]] || [[word:zajachashan|zajachashan]] || [[word:zajachakan|zajachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajachathaoro|zajachathaoro]] || [[word:zajachajaoro|zajachajaoro]] || [[word:zajachashaoro|zajachashaoro]] || [[word:zajachakaoro|zajachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
